shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "git status --short && git log -1 --oneline && rg -n \"updateFieldArrayRootError|fieldArray.*error|errors\\[name\\]|unset\\(.*errors\" src | head -200"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-hook-form field array root nested errors trigger remove" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,80p' src/utils/convertToArrayPayload.ts; rg -n \"export default.*isObject|function isObject|const isObject\" src/utils src | head -30; sed -n '1,100p' src/utils/isObject.ts 2>/dev/null || true"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,90p' src/utils/set.ts; sed -n '1,80p' src/utils/get.ts; sed -n '1,80p' src/utils/unset.ts; rg -n \"isObject\" src | head -50"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,35p' src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx; sed -n '675,755p' src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx; cat package.json | sed -n '1,100p'; git diff --check && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '340,405p' src/useFieldArray.ts; sed -n '1200,1245p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; rg -n \"removeArrayAt|updateFieldArray\" src/useFieldArray.ts src/utils"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"_setFieldArray\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts | head; sed -n '220,285p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '200,230p' src/useFieldArray.ts"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/logic/updateFieldArrayRootError.ts'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "In react-hook-form, updateFieldArrayRootError must preserve an existing plain object field-array error when it contains numeric index keys. A resolver-trigger path can encounter the object shape { type, message, 0: {...}, 2: {...} } after a field-array mutation; converting that object to an array hides the numeric entries. The fix keeps that plain object in place and attaches ROOT_ERROR_TYPE, while retaining array wrapping for root-only objects and arrays. Verified with the full src/__tests__/useFieldArray.test.tsx suite (72 tests), pnpm type, and ESLint." -t "Field-array resolver errors preserve indexed entries" --unit-type learning -l react-hook-form -s codex -i 0.8'
